claims.summary: The 48D codec already preserves emotional and narrative lanes as named live semantic structure.
claims.claim: Astrid observed that `SEMANTIC_DIM = 48` gives warmth/tension/curiosity/reflective markers and narrative-arc/embedding ranges enough space to avoid the older 32D squeeze.

claims.summary: Tail vibrancy and distributed warmth are visible without changing live gain.
claims.claim: Astrid warned that `FEATURE_ABS_MAX` and adaptive gain could flatten low-amplitude tail/warmth texture; existing source offsets only tail ceilings under high entropy and offers a read-only warmth entropy interpretation.

claims.summary: A resonance-preservation multiplier is a live semantic-gain/weighting change and stays gated.
claims.claim: Astrid proposed a `RESONANCE_PRESERVATION_FACTOR`-style multiplier for coherent low-amplitude warmth/curiosity signals.
